metadata.description: German salary-statistics skills powered by the entgeltatlas-cli (Bundesagentur für Arbeit Entgeltatlas API)

plugins.name: entgeltatlas
plugins.description: Look up what a German occupation earns, compare salaries across gender/region/level, and resolve the KldB and dimension codes — over the Bundesagentur für Arbeit Entgeltatlas API via the entgeltatlas-cli.
